findings: bin/stampede.sh does not create .stampede/{run_id}/queue; derives BASE_DIR, requires queue to exist, exits if missing/empty
Script does not write task JSON files; only counts/reads queue/*.json and workers claim via atomic mv
Metaswarm ledger init creates commanders/ and collab/ dirs, append-only collab ledgers, atomic protocol.json via os.replace
Per-commander progress dirs created via Python os.makedirs with exist_ok=True
Atomic write pattern uses *.tmp suffix + os.replace, NOT .tmp- prefix + mv
Initial writes of swarm-state.json and child-agents.jsonl use plain w truncating writes with no temp-file rename
